no_rescue_boundary: D-002K-P3 is part of fresh lineage D-002K and does NOT rescue D-002J; D-002J remains terminally REFUSED at P7. This phase locks the metric layer (definitions only); it sets no numeric decision threshold (power-gate territory) and scores no real data.

metrics.definition: The single K-P0-locked confirmatory endpoint (Cohen's-d form). Given the locked pre-window baseline segment B and the locked in-crisis segment I of the K-P1 funding-stress observable series: mu_pre = mean(B), mu_in = mean(I), sigma_pre = sample std of B (ddof=1, degrees of freedom fixed at pre-registration). The metric is the single scalar (mu_in - mu_pre) / sigma_pre. Byte-locked by K-P0 d002k_primary_metric_contract_v1.json::primary_metric_id; no swap, no second confirmatory metric, no post-hoc primary.
metrics.pre_window_spec: The pre_len samples ending immediately before crisis onset_idx (the locked matched pre-window baseline B, per the K-P2 matched-placebo policy calendar).
metrics.post_window_spec: The post_len samples starting at crisis onset_idx (the locked in-crisis window I, per the K-P2 matched-placebo policy calendar).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here. This contract locks WHAT is measured and HOW, never the threshold VALUE.

metrics.definition: EXPLORATORY ONLY. Peak in-crisis z-score: z-standardize the post-window with the pre-window (mu_pre, sigma_pre); return max(post_z). Never confirmatory; never enters the Bonferroni denominator; cannot be promoted to primary without a fresh D-002L pre-registration.
metrics.pre_window_spec: pre_len samples ending before onset_idx (locked baseline).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here.

metrics.definition: EXPLORATORY ONLY. Composite-trapezoid integral (unit spacing) of the in-crisis z-curve (post-window standardized by the pre-window baseline). Cumulative-stress descriptor; never confirmatory; never in the Bonferroni denominator.
metrics.pre_window_spec: pre_len samples ending before onset_idx (locked baseline).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here.

metrics.definition: EXPLORATORY ONLY. Samples (post-peak) until the in-crisis z-curve first drops to <= half its peak; defined no-recovery sentinel == post_len when the half level is never re-crossed (honest censoring value, not silent repair). Recovery-speed descriptor; never confirmatory.
metrics.pre_window_spec: pre_len samples ending before onset_idx (locked baseline).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here.

metrics.definition: EXPLORATORY ONLY. Ordinary-least-squares slope of the in-crisis z-trajectory (post-window standardized by the pre-window baseline) against unit-spaced sample index. Transition-steepness descriptor; never confirmatory.
metrics.pre_window_spec: pre_len samples ending before onset_idx (locked baseline).
metrics.post_window_spec: post_len samples from onset_idx (locked in-crisis, >= 2 samples).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here.

metrics.definition: EXPLORATORY ONLY. Ratio of in-crisis sample std to pre-window baseline sample std (both ddof=1). Variance-burst descriptor; never confirmatory; never in the Bonferroni denominator.
metrics.pre_window_spec: pre_len samples ending before onset_idx (locked baseline, >= 2 samples).
metrics.post_window_spec: post_len samples from onset_idx (locked in-crisis, >= 2 samples).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here.

metrics.definition: EXPLORATORY ONLY. Fraction of in-crisis samples whose pre-window-standardized z strictly exceeds a fixed DESCRIPTIVE z-level (default 1.0; this is NOT the deferred decision threshold). Stress-persistence descriptor; never confirmatory.
metrics.pre_window_spec: pre_len samples ending before onset_idx (locked baseline).
metrics.standardization: z-score vs pre-window baseline (mu_pre, sigma_pre with ddof=1)
metrics.contrast: Delta = metric_crisis - mean(metric over K-P2 matched placebos)
metrics.decision_threshold_semantics: deferred to D-002K power gate (P-power); NOT set here. The fixed z=1.0 descriptive level is a metric-internal exploratory constant, not the confirmatory decision cut.
